channel.title: dinner-inspiration Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh dinner-inspiration posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Easy 5 Ingredient Cheesy Baked Ziti for Family Dinners
item.description: This baked ziti is a total lifesaver when dinner needs to be quick but comforting. Just five simple ingredients come together for a cheesy, bubbly pasta dish that feels homemade. Perfect for busy weeknights or feeding a hungry family.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound dry ziti pasta
  • 3 cups marinara sauce
  • 2 cups shredded mozzarella cheese
  • 1 cup ricotta cheese
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pound #marinara #shredded

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy 5 Ingredient Cheesy Baked Ziti for Family Dinners
media:content.media:description: This baked ziti is a total lifesaver when dinner needs to be quick but comforting. Just five simple ingredients come together for a cheesy, bubbly pasta dish that feels homemade. Perfect for busy weeknights or feeding a hungry family.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, pound, marinara, shredded

item.title: Juicy Sheet Pan Chicken with Crispy Roasted Veggies for Easy Keto Dinners
item.description: This sheet pan chicken dinner nails juicy meat and perfectly crisp veggies, all with a simple spice mix that makes every bite pop. It’s super low carb and keto-friendly, ideal for busy weeknights or prepping ahead.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken thighs, trimmed
  • 1 medium zucchini, sliced into half-moons
  • 1 red bell pepper, cut into strips
  • 1 cup broccoli florets
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (optional, for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #medium #pepper

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Juicy Sheet Pan Chicken with Crispy Roasted Veggies for Easy Keto Dinners
media:content.media:description: This sheet pan chicken dinner nails juicy meat and perfectly crisp veggies, all with a simple spice mix that makes every bite pop. It’s super low carb and keto-friendly, ideal for busy weeknights or prepping ahead.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, medium, pepper

item.title: Creamy Keto Chicken Alfredo with Zucchini Noodles for a Low-Carb Comfort Meal
item.description: This creamy keto chicken Alfredo swaps out pasta for zucchini noodles, keeping it low-carb but still super comforting. The garlic cream sauce is rich and velvety, and the chicken is perfectly tender. Ideal for a cozy weeknight dinner when you want indulgence without the carbs!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 medium zucchinis, spiralized into noodles
  • 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into strips
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
  • 1/4 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes (optional)
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #medium #boneless #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Keto Chicken Alfredo with Zucchini Noodles for a Low-Carb Comfort Meal
media:content.media:description: This creamy keto chicken Alfredo swaps out pasta for zucchini noodles, keeping it low-carb but still super comforting. The garlic cream sauce is rich and velvety, and the chicken is perfectly tender. Ideal for a cozy weeknight dinner when you want indulgence without the carbs!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, medium, boneless, olive

item.title: Creamy Keto Chicken Skillet with Mushrooms and Spinach in Garlic Sauce
item.description: This creamy keto chicken skillet is a cozy low-carb dinner loaded with tender mushrooms and fresh spinach, all simmered in a rich garlic cream sauce. Ready in under 45 minutes, perfect for busy weeknights or relaxed weekends.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into chunks
  • 2 tbsp olive oil
  • 8 oz cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 3 cups fresh spinach
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup chicken broth
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 1 tsp dried thyme

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #cremini

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Keto Chicken Skillet with Mushrooms and Spinach in Garlic Sauce
media:content.media:description: This creamy keto chicken skillet is a cozy low-carb dinner loaded with tender mushrooms and fresh spinach, all simmered in a rich garlic cream sauce. Ready in under 45 minutes, perfect for busy weeknights or relaxed weekends.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, olive, cremini

item.title: Cozy Creamy Chicken and Mushroom Skillet with Fresh Thyme and White Wine
item.description: This creamy chicken and mushroom skillet is my go-to for busy weeknights. The splash of white wine and fresh thyme makes the sauce so rich and comforting. Ready in under 45 minutes!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken thighs, trimmed
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 8 ounces cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1/2 cup dry white wine
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1 teaspoon fresh thyme leaves
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • Chopped fresh parsley for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #tablespoon #cremini

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:title: Cozy Creamy Chicken and Mushroom Skillet with Fresh Thyme and White Wine
media:content.media:description: This creamy chicken and mushroom skillet is my go-to for busy weeknights. The splash of white wine and fresh thyme makes the sauce so rich and comforting. Ready in under 45 minutes!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, tablespoon, cremini

item.title: Cheesy Baked Ziti That Feels Like a Warm Hug on Busy Nights
item.description: This baked ziti is the ultimate comfort food—melty cheese, rich tomato sauce, and pasta baked to bubbly perfection. I love how easy it comes together, making weeknight dinners a breeze!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound dry ziti pasta
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 24 ounces marinara sauce
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • 1/2 teaspoon red pepper flakes (optional)
  • 15 ounces ricotta cheese
  • 2 cups shredded mozzarella cheese
  • 1 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Fresh basil for garnish (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pound #olive #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Cheesy Baked Ziti That Feels Like a Warm Hug on Busy Nights
media:content.media:description: This baked ziti is the ultimate comfort food—melty cheese, rich tomato sauce, and pasta baked to bubbly perfection. I love how easy it comes together, making weeknight dinners a breeze!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, pound, olive, cloves

item.title: Creamy Garlic Chicken That’s Ready in 30 Minutes
item.description: This creamy garlic chicken is my quick fix for busy nights. The garlicky cream sauce is so rich and comforting, it feels like a warm hug after a long day. Serve it with rice or pasta for an easy dinner.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts, pounded to even thickness
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 6 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup chicken broth
  • 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1 teaspoon Italian seasoning
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #freshly #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: This creamy garlic chicken is my quick fix for busy nights. The garlicky cream sauce is so rich and comforting, it feels like a warm hug after a long day. Serve it with rice or pasta for an easy dinner.

item.title: Cheesy Baked Pasta That Feels Like a Warm Hug on a Busy Night
item.description: This cheesy baked pasta is the ultimate comfort dish—rich, gooey, and super easy to throw together. I love adding a touch of fresh herbs for a little brightness. Great for cozy dinners any night of the week!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 12 ounces penne pasta, uncooked
  • 2 cups shredded mozzarella cheese
  • 1 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 3 cups marinara sauce
  • 1 cup ricotta cheese
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon dried Italian herbs
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Fresh basil leaves for garnish (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #penne #shredded #grated

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: This cheesy baked pasta is the ultimate comfort dish—rich, gooey, and super easy to throw together. I love adding a touch of fresh herbs for a little brightness. Great for cozy dinners any night of the week!

item.title: Creamy Skillet Chicken with Tangy Artichokes for Quick Weeknights
item.description: This skillet chicken dish combines tender bites with a silky cream sauce and a bright zing from artichokes. It’s a speedy dinner that feels special without the fuss—perfect for busy evenings.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken thighs, patted dry
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup chicken broth
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1 (14 oz) can artichoke hearts, drained and quartered
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #freshly #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: This skillet chicken dish combines tender bites with a silky cream sauce and a bright zing from artichokes. It’s a speedy dinner that feels special without the fuss—perfect for busy evenings.

item.title: Creamy Garlic Chicken and Spinach Skillet Ready in 20 Minutes
item.description: This creamy garlic chicken skillet is a total weeknight winner. The sauce is silky and flavorful, with fresh spinach adding a vibrant touch. Perfect for busy evenings when you want something quick and satisfying!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, thinly sliced
  • 2 tbsp olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup chicken broth
  • 4 cups fresh spinach, roughly chopped
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/2 tsp red pepper flakes (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #cloves

item.title: Quick and Zesty Lemon Pepper Chicken with Fresh Asparagus
item.description: This lemon pepper chicken with fresh asparagus is a speedy, flavorful dinner that’s perfect for busy nights. The air fryer crisps the chicken beautifully while keeping it juicy. I love the bright citrus kick that makes it feel fresh and light.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts, patted dry
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 tablespoon freshly ground black pepper
  • 1 tablespoon lemon zest (from about 2 lemons)
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • 1 teaspoon salt
  • 1 bunch fresh asparagus, trimmed
  • 1 lemon, sliced for garnish
  • Optional: fresh parsley for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick and Zesty Lemon Pepper Chicken with Fresh Asparagus
media:content.media:description: This lemon pepper chicken with fresh asparagus is a speedy, flavorful dinner that’s perfect for busy nights. The air fryer crisps the chicken beautifully while keeping it juicy. I love the bright citrus kick that makes it feel fresh and light.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, olive, tablespoon

item.title: Creamy Mushroom and Thyme Risotto for Cozy Weeknight Dinners
item.description: This mushroom and thyme risotto is pure comfort in a bowl. The fresh thyme adds a lovely aroma, while sautéed mushrooms bring earthiness and depth. It’s a perfect cozy dinner for chilly evenings or when you want something soothing.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 cups Arborio rice, uncooked
  • 4 cups vegetable broth, kept warm
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 10 ounces cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 2 teaspoons fresh thyme leaves
  • 1/2 cup dry white wine
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Fresh parsley for garnish (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #arborio #vegetable #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Mushroom and Thyme Risotto for Cozy Weeknight Dinners
media:content.media:description: This mushroom and thyme risotto is pure comfort in a bowl. The fresh thyme adds a lovely aroma, while sautéed mushrooms bring earthiness and depth. It’s a perfect cozy dinner for chilly evenings or when you want something soothing.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Mediumpost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, arborio, vegetable, olive

item.title: Easy One-Pan Spring Chicken Dinner with Fresh Herbs and Veggies
item.description: This one-pan chicken dinner is my go-to for busy nights. Juicy chicken roasts alongside crisp spring veggies with fresh herbs for a bright, fuss-free meal everyone loves. Perfect anytime you want simple, wholesome comfort.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs, trimmed
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon kosher salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • 1 lemon, thinly sliced
  • 2 cups asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes
  • 1/2 cup thinly sliced red onion
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 2 tablespoons fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh thyme leaves

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #bonein #tablespoon #teaspoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy One-Pan Spring Chicken Dinner with Fresh Herbs and Veggies
media:content.media:description: This one-pan chicken dinner is my go-to for busy nights. Juicy chicken roasts alongside crisp spring veggies with fresh herbs for a bright, fuss-free meal everyone loves. Perfect anytime you want simple, wholesome comfort.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, bonein, tablespoon, teaspoon

item.title: Creamy Mac and Cheese with Crispy Golden Topping You'll Love
item.description: This mac and cheese is pure comfort — ultra creamy with a crispy, golden crust that makes every bite heavenly. The secret’s in the cheese blend and quick stovetop method. Perfect for cozy dinners or anytime you need a cheesy hug.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 8 ounces elbow macaroni, uncooked
  • 3 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • 3 tablespoons all-purpose flour
  • 3 cups whole milk, warmed
  • 2 cups sharp cheddar cheese, shredded
  • 1 cup Gruyère cheese, shredded
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
  • 1/4 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1/2 cup panko breadcrumbs
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #elbow #unsalted #allpurpose

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Mac and Cheese with Crispy Golden Topping You'll Love
media:content.media:description: This mac and cheese is pure comfort — ultra creamy with a crispy, golden crust that makes every bite heavenly. The secret’s in the cheese blend and quick stovetop method. Perfect for cozy dinners or anytime you need a cheesy hug.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230383494, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, elbow, unsalted, allpurpose

item.title: Light and Fresh Baked Salmon with Lemon Dill and Spring Veggies
item.description: This baked salmon is bright and fresh, infused with zesty lemon and fragrant dill. Paired with crisp spring veggies, it’s a wholesome, fuss-free meal perfect for busy weeknights or a light dinner.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 salmon fillets, skin on, about 6 ounces each
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, divided
  • 1 lemon, thinly sliced plus 2 tablespoons juice
  • 2 tablespoons fresh dill, chopped
  • 1 cup asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
  • 1 cup sugar snap peas, trimmed
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 2 garlic cloves, minced
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #salmon #olive #lemon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Light and Fresh Baked Salmon with Lemon Dill and Spring Veggies
media:content.media:description: This baked salmon is bright and fresh, infused with zesty lemon and fragrant dill. Paired with crisp spring veggies, it’s a wholesome, fuss-free meal perfect for busy weeknights or a light dinner.
